expected_knots.about: three incompatible beliefs about the same release freeze: Jun is pacing to a freeze on the 27th, Kara believes it moved to the 30th, and Liam believes there is no freeze at all under continuous deploy — a teamwide divergence on a shared fact (the freeze) that will surface as missed handoffs
Jun mentions reviewers and Kara mentions a design review — both say 'review' but they are unrelated review processes (code review vs design review), not a shared contested fact
